function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system per root rulebook, read finance schema and finance-local AGENTS, then used exact invoice reads for auditable finance lookup.
function.outcome_justification: The exact line item 'checklist rewrite and rollout pack' is present in four invoice files. In 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md it is 390 but dated 2026-01-19, before the requested range. In 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md it is 390 and dated within the range. The other two matches are dated 2026-04-21 and 2026-04-27, after today from context, so they are not part of money made so far since the beginning of February 2026. Therefore the exact total is 390.
